title: DevFlow project config
description: DevFlow project configuration. The LOCAL tier (the /implement, /review, /docs skills you run inside Claude Code) works with NO config file at all — every value has a sane built-in default. You only need this file if you enable the GitHub Actions automation (the optional cloud/autopilot tier). See docs/cloud-setup.md.

$schema.description: Path/URL to this schema for editor autocomplete and validation. Ignored at load time.

project_number.description: GitHub Project board number from your project URL (https://github.com/users/<you>/projects/<number>). Only the board-sync workflows use it. Placeholder: YOUR_PROJECT_NUMBER.

base_branch.description: Branch that PRs target by default. Used as the review/merge base.

claude_model.description: Claude model for AI-powered workflows (individual workflows may override).

statuses.description: Project board Status field values — must match your GitHub Project EXACTLY.

bot_login.description: Bot account login distinguishing AI-authored PRs from human ones. Leave empty if you are not using a dedicated bot account.

cloud_secrets.description: Optional secret-name overrides consumed by install.sh. Workflows reference PROJECT_PAT by default; map it to your org's name here and install.sh rewrites the workflows on every run. Omit this block to use the default name. (CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN is not remappable.)

allowed_bots.description: Bot logins allowed to trigger the Claude action (comma-separated). 'claude' is Anthropic's GitHub App identity; add your own bot/automation logins (e.g. dependabot).

workpad_marker.description: Marker line identifying the persistent /implement workpad comment on issues. One comment per issue whose body starts with this marker.

effort.description: Reasoning effort for Claude-action workflows. 'medium' omits --effort so the model's built-in default applies.

allowed_tools.description: Extra --allowed-tools entries for the light @claude path (claude.yml), APPENDED on top of devflow's built-in base list. Use claude-code-action tool syntax, e.g. "Bash(make:*)", "Bash(docker compose:*)". Does not apply to /devflow:implement — see claude_implement.allowed_tools. Empty/omitted → base list only.

trigger_label.description: Issue label that triggers /devflow:implement (claude-implement.yml). Adding this label to an issue kicks off implementation — a human label-add is a real user event, so it needs no bot comment or GitHub App. The label must already exist in the repo. Empty/omitted → 'devflow:implement'.

allowed_tools.description: Extra --allowed-tools entries for the /devflow:implement path (claude-implement.yml), APPENDED on top of devflow's built-in base list. The implement path does NOT inherit claude.allowed_tools, so list every extra tool you want during implementation here. Empty/omitted → base list only.

setup.description: Cloud-tier runtime provisioning: how the GitHub Actions runner is prepared BEFORE Claude runs, for the @claude and /devflow:implement workflows.

python_version.description: setup-python runs ONLY if non-empty. devflow's own helpers currently need Python >= 3.11 with PyYAML, so keep this set until devflow's bash-only refactor lands.

node_version.description: setup-node runs ONLY if non-empty. Set it (e.g. '20') if your project's tests/build need Node.

install.description: Shell lines run verbatim (joined with newlines) after the language setups. Put devflow's own deps first, then your project's. Empty array → skipped.

docs.description: Documentation paths used by the /docs suite.

documented_label.description: Label applied by /implement once its docs pass has run.

devflow_retrospective.description: DevFlow retrospective / self-improvement loop, consumed by the /devflow-weekly orchestrator (a locally-run skill, not a GitHub Actions workflow).

retrospective_model.description: Optional --model override for the retrospective subagent.

audit_model.description: Optional --model override for the audit subagent.

implementation_branch_prefix.description: Branch prefix your implementation bot uses for its PRs. The loop only processes PRs on this prefix (plus DevFlow's own devflow/audit-* branches).

min_occurrences.description: Repetition gate. status == regressed always bypasses this.

cooldown_days.description: Skip audit if the youngest audit PR is younger than this (createdAt-based).

max_prs_per_run.description: Soft cap on PRs processed per scheduled retrospective run.

watched_authors.description: Authors whose merged PRs the loop retrospects. Defaults to claude.allowed_bots if unset.
